error_signature: The expression evaluated to a falsy value: a.ok(to)
title: Workflow execution fails with falsy value error
symptom: When running the workflow, it returns an error stating 'The expression evaluated to a falsy value: a.ok(to)'. This prevents any node in the workflow from executing properly.
applies_when: Running a workflow with HTTP request nodes
not_this_if: The workflow runs successfully after refreshing the page
root_cause: This error occurs when the workflow's execution context has stale or invalid data, particularly after previous runs. The execution data may not be cleared properly, leading to conflicts in subsequent executions.
fix_steps: Remove the execution data from the workflow
agent_instruction: Clear the execution data before testing the workflow again.
